MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: J. Rumsey; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Nasir Patel is present appearing Pro Per.
Defendant John Mcdermott is present.
Attorney, Richard Roisman is representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Elan Lambert, litigants and counsel meet and confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
The trial date of April 02, 2013 is vacated.
